subcodes.first_line: O thou steadfast in the Covenant! The letter thou didst address to Jináb-i-Ismá'íl Áqá was noted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان مکتوبی که بجناب اسمعیل آقا مرقوم نموده بودید ملحوظ گردید سبب
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
